hero.title:
The Voices of
the Dispatch
hero.subtitle: Not anonymous authors, but attentive guides sharing a lived experience of the coast.

intro.leadQuote: Cinque Terre deserves to be shown by people who listen more than they promote. Every recommendation on this site is filtered through human perspective.
intro.paragraph: We are not experts claiming authority, but attentive guides offering context. We believe that what you read should be shaped by lived experience, attention, and care.

closing.title: The Art of Collaboration
paragraphs: This site is shaped by conversation, disagreement, and shared attention. It is not a static resource, but a living record of our evolving relationship with Cinque Terre.
We invite you to read these pages knowing who is speaking. Move through the villages with a sense of familiarity rather than authority, and allow the place to reveal itself to you in its own time.
